metadata.title: You're the One for Me (Labor of Love Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:47.94] Bustin' up on a cloud, shout out loud
[00:51.92] You're the one for me
[00:55.89] With your love by my side
[00:58.16] The world will be mine
[00:59.92] You're the one for me
[01:04.03] With this true love I found
[01:05.55] It takes my feet up off the ground to fly away
[01:12.08] With this true love, my dear
[01:13.75] Takes away my every fear, don't go away
[01:19.48] You just don't know what you did to me
[01:23.14] But I'm not the same (I'm not the same)
[01:27.34] Since you gave me love
[01:29.89] That's sheltered from the rain
[01:35.39] You just don't know (just don't know) how you make me feel
[01:39.35] Your sweet lovin', girl, is so unreal
